title: pneumonanthe calycosa
intro: Pneumonanthe calycosa, also known as lungwort, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pneumonanthe calycosa include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to ease congestion and promote a healthy respiratory system. In herbal preparations, Pneumonanthe calycosa is often used as a dried herb, made into teas or infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
